title: taraxacum accedens
intro: Taraxacum accedens, also known as the rough hawk's beard or rough dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and liver problems due to its bitter compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum accedens include improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting liver function, as well as having antioxidant and anti-diarrheal properties. Taraxacum accedens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies.
